# omada_devices (Data Source)

Lists all devices (APs, switches, gateways) in the configured site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "omada_devices" "all" {}

output "devices" {
  value = data.omada_devices.all.devices
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `devices` (Attributes List) List of devices. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--devices))

<a id="nestedatt--devices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `devices`

Read-Only:

- `client_num` (Number) Number of connected clients.
- `cpu_util` (Number) CPU utilization percentage.
- `firmware_version` (String) The current firmware version.
- `ip` (String) The device IP address.
- `mac` (String) The device MAC address.
- `mem_util` (Number) Memory utilization percentage.
- `model` (String) The device model (e.g., 'EAP655-Wall').
- `name` (String) The device display name.
- `status` (Number) Device status code (14=connected, 0=disconnected).
- `status_category` (Number) Device status category.
- `type` (String) Device type: 'ap', 'switch', or 'gateway'.
